LanguageData.NCL_TOTALWARFARE_AUTO_TRIGGER_TEXT:
A message from NCL indicates a critical situation:
Your colony's total wealth has reached a significant scale, causing the Mechanoid hives to perceive you as a threat that must be eliminated. From now on, they may equip their forces with more advanced weaponry and launch total warfare against you. Prepare for battle.
LanguageData.NCL.MustBeDisabledWhenActive: Cannot change while silo is active
LanguageData.NCL.ConditionDesc.HighAngleOnly: Only fires when hostile high-angle projectiles are present
LanguageData.NCL.ConditionDesc.AnyEnemyThreat: Fires when hostile high-angle projectiles or enemy combat units are present
LanguageData.TLD.DetectionEnabledDesc: Detection system is active\nProjectile interception enabled
LanguageData.TLD.DetectionDisabledDesc: Detection system disabled\nNo interception or rotation
LanguageData.NCL_TOTALWARFARE_MANUAL_TRIGGER_TEXT: Manual activation signal confirmed Mechanoid Total Warfare Protocol X activated! All mechanoid units will receive battlefield enhancements: • Overdrive: Some mechanoids are overloaded with massive energy injection for short periods • Optical Camo Disruption: Random mechanoid units are equipped with optical camouflage modules, making them invisible on the battlefield. • Composite Armor Reinforcement Protocol: Some units' protective capabilities are significantly enhanced. • Tactical Artillery Coordination Module: Some units can summon turret support • Long Range Ballistics Optimization System: Some units' weapon range is increased. • High Mobility Phase Shift Drive: Some units' movement speed is greatly enhanced. Tactical Recommendations: - Prioritize EMP weapons - Deploy sensors to detect invisible units - Lay point defense systems to counter high-angle projectiles
LanguageData.NCL_TOTALWARFARE_ENABLE_BEACON_ENHANCEME: Enable Mechanoid enhancements triggered by war beacons
Disabling will completely turn off mechanoid enhancement effects triggered by war beacons
LanguageData.NCL_TOTALWARFARE_ENABLE_WEALTH_TRIGGER_D: Automatically triggers mechanoid enhancements when colony wealth reaches 1.5 million
LanguageData.NCL_TOTALWARFARE_SHOW_DEV_LOGS_DESC: Display debug information in developer mode
LanguageData.NCL_TOTALWARFARE_START_LOG: NCL: Total Warfare started - Wealth: {0} | Status: {1}
LanguageData.NCL_WARBEACON_INSPECT_DESCRIPTION: This ancient war device appears to be reactivated through repairs
LanguageData.NCL_WARBEACON_NO_MATERIAL: Lacking the materials that were required for fixing this structure
LanguageData.NCL_SHELLCORE_NO_MATERIAL: Lacking the materials that were required for fixing this structure
LanguageData.NCL_WARBEACON_REACTIVATE_DESCRIPTION:
You have successfully repaired this war beacon. Its massive structure looms over the wasteland like a slumbering beast, sending chills down your spine. As the core structure used by mechanoids to mark strategic coordinates, its activation means you will be exposed to their sight—more powerful, more deadly mechanoid forces will pour in, attempting to utterly destroy you.
 But high risk comes with high reward. By analyzing the beacon's core data, you may crack the mechanoids' technological barriers and unlock cutting-edge technologies once beyond reach.
 The choice is yours—remain silent for preservation, or ignite the war and face the unknown?
 Activate it, activate the war.
LanguageData.CerebrexCore_SpawnDesc: A mechanoid CerebrexCore has been constructed in your base. Its deep space signal transmitter is currently dormant but may awaken the entire mechanoid empire at any time.
LanguageData.NCL_COREBASED_ENHANCEMENT_DESC:
You have restarted this mechanoid CerebrexCore. Its signal transmitter has begun broadcasting coordinates into deep space. Mechanoid raids will be reactivated, their attacks will break through scale limits, new mechanoid units will join the battlefield, and all mechanoid forces will receive enhancements.
Risk often accompanies reward. By actively researching the core's neural matrix with research staff, you can unlock the mechanoids' cutting-edge technologies.
LanguageData.LightningStrikeDesc: Summon a powerful lightning strike on the target area, dealing EMP damage
LanguageData.LightningStrike_NoPower: Cannot activate EMP attack: Not connected to power
LanguageData.LightningStrike_NeedPower: More power needed: At least {0}W required
LanguageData.LightningStrike_PowerStatus: Available power: {0}W / EMP attack single use: {1}W
LanguageData.NCL_AutoLightningStrike_NoPower: Cannot activate lightning attack: Not connected to power
LanguageData.NCL_AutoLightningStrike_NeedPower: More power needed: At least {0}W required
LanguageData.NCL_OverdriveMode_RequiresAuto: Auto strike mode must be enabled first
LanguageData.NCL_AutoLightningStrike_PowerStatus: Available power: {0}W / Lightning attack single use: {1}W
LanguageData.NCL_Overdrive_Description: Double targets, half cooldown, but 2x power consumption
LanguageData.NCL_MechHealed: {0} ({1}) has received {3} effect, consuming {2} units of fuel
LanguageData.ResetBandwidthDesc: Reset all upgrade levels to 0, restoring original state
LanguageData.NCL_ADVANCED_NODE_TITLE: Initial bandwidth granted by band antenna
LanguageData.NCL_ENABLE_CORETRIGGER_DESC: When enabled, rebuilding ancient mechanoid cores activates advanced war systems
LanguageData.NCL_GENERATE_ANCIENT_WAR_BEACON_REMAINS: Generate ancient war beacon remains (only to ensure players joining mid-game can experience mod content normally)
LanguageData.NCL_ANCIENT_WAR_BEACON_REMAINS_GENSTEPDE: Ancient war beacon remains generation step definition not found
LanguageData.NCL_SUCCESS_GENERATE_ANCIENT_WAR_BEACON: Successfully generated ancient war beacon remains
LanguageData.NCL_ANCIENT_REMAINS_GENERATED: Ancient remains generated on this map
LanguageData.NCL_INVISIBILITY_VISIBLE_TO_PLAYER: Visibility of Mechanoid Enhancement Invisibility to Player
LanguageData.NCL_INVISIBILITY_VISIBLE_TO_PLAYER_DESC: If disabled, the invisibility effect granted by mechanoid enhancements will hide the mechanoid from the player as well. (Changes require restart to take effect)
LanguageData.NCL.NEED_MORE_FUEL: Need to add {0}% more fuel to reach peak output
LanguageData.NCL.HIGH_TEMP_WARNING: Critical reactor overheating! Immediate shutdown required!
LanguageData.NCL.EMERGENCY_SHUTDOWN_DESC: Immediately shut down to reduce temperature
LanguageData.NCL.ALERT_CRITICAL_EXPLANATION:
Reactor overheating detected! If not shut down immediately, some equipment will self-destruct!

Affected equipment:
{0}

Emergency measures:
- Use emergency shutdown
- Improve cooling system
LanguageData.NCL.ALERT_WARNING_EXPLANATION:
High temperature detected! Some equipment operating under dangerous conditions.

Affected equipment:
{0}

Recommended measures:
- Reduce equipment power output
- Improve ventilation
LanguageData.NCL_DAILY_SPECIAL_HEDIFF_LIMIT: Maximum number of EMP mortars that can be spawned in a single raid
LanguageData.NCL_DAILY_SPECIAL_HEDIFF_LIMIT_DESC: Actually the daily limit for the number of EMP mortars that can be spawned
LanguageData.NCL_DAILY_SPECIAL_HEDIFF_LIMIT_A: Maximum number of HE mortars that can be spawned in a single raid
LanguageData.NCL_DAILY_SPECIAL_HEDIFF_LIMIT_DESC_A: Actually the daily limit for the number of HE mortars that can be spawned
LanguageData.NCL_MustPlaceRoofed: Must be placed in a roofed room
LanguageData.NCL.KillAllSplitterSpiderDesc: Command all splitter spiders produced by this mechanoid to self-destruct
LanguageData.MechShield_Reactivated: This mechanoid boss's localized core ensures immunity to external psychic attacks
LanguageData.AutoReleaseDronesDesc: When enabled, automatically deploys drones when cooldown ends until resources are exhausted
LanguageData.NCL.FireAllUniversityStudentsDesc: One-click delete all existing university Minitors
LanguageData.NCL.CanNotFireAllUniversityStudents: There arenot any university Minitors exist in the map
LanguageData.CannotDropBoundWeapon: This weapon cannot be dropped on the ground
LanguageData.RestartCoreDECS: Restart the mechanoid core, which will reactivate all mechanoids on this planet
LanguageData.maxDefaultThreatPoints: Raid point cap when using Justice as storyteller
LanguageData.maxDefaultThreatPointsDesc: Raid point cap when using Justice as storyteller, default value is 3 million
LanguageData.maxPawns: Raid pawn cap when using Justice as storyteller
LanguageData.maxPawnsDesc: Raid pawn cap when using Justice as storyteller, default value is 400
LanguageData.NCL_Checkbox_DisableWindowWithUpdate: Disable normal startup popup (will still prompt on updates)
LanguageData.NCL_Content_Main:
Thanks for subscribing to "Mechanoids: Total Warfare" MOD!
Core features: ◆ 20+ new mechanoids with unique combat roles ◆ Expanded battle scale and new combat mechanics ◆ Progressive difficulty (late-game focused) ◆ Toggleable enemy enhancements ◆ Hidden NCL faction with worm garrison system
Note: Worm garrisons are emergency tools - overuse reduces challenge.
LanguageData.NCL_Content_Page1: Essential Setup: • MOD requires generated mechanoid ruins • Mid-game joinning players: Use "Generate Ruins" in MOD settings • Works ONLY on planetary surfaces (not spaceships) • Without ruins, core content remains locked
LanguageData.NCL_Content_Page2:
Development Status: Beta v0.8
Planned: • Balance adjustments • Complete story campaign
LanguageData.NCL_Content_Page3:
Enemy Mechanoid Enhancements: • Applies randomly (0/unit in early game, max 3/unit as the game progress) • Effects: - Mortar Support - Point Defense Support - Blast Cannon Support - +20% Weapon Range and attack speed - + Move Speed - + Armor - Optical Camo (revealed at 45 tiles) - Overdrive State
Tactical Tip: Build laser point defense against mortars.
LanguageData.NCL.SmokePopToggleDesc: Toggle automatic smoke pop on hit
LanguageData.NCL.ActivateSiloDesc: Raise the silo lid and enable missile launch
LanguageData.NCL.DeactivateSiloDesc: Lower the silo lid and disable missile launch
LanguageData.NCL.LaunchIntervalDesc: Adjust time between missile launches (0.1-3.0 seconds)
LanguageData.NCL_SummonGizmoDesc: Consume silver to summon drop pod units
LanguageData.NCL.OpenLidDesc: Begin powering up and deploying the artillery platform.
LanguageData.NCL.CloseLidDesc: Abort all operations and power down the artillery platform.
LanguageData.NCL.LaunchSkyfallerDesc: Select a target location or pawn for the artillery strike.
LanguageData.NCL.LaunchSkyfallerGlobalDesc: Select a target location or pawn for the Global strike.
LanguageData.NCL.AimingDesc: The artillery is adjusting its firing solution. It will begin the bombardment when aiming is complete.
LanguageData.NCL.CoolingDownDesc: The artillery is dissipating heat and recharging systems before it can fire again.
LanguageData.NCL.LidOpeningCountdown: Artillery startup sequence: {0}s until ready to fire.
LanguageData.NCL.LidRemainingTime: Remaining active uptime before automatic shutdown: {0}s.
LanguageData.NCL.LidClosingCountdown: Artillery shutdown sequence in progress: {0}s until offline.
LanguageData.NCL.NotEnoughSteel: Not enough HE Shells to fire: requires {0} shells per shot.
